header.name: emit-guidance
header.description: Deliver your turn's output by emitting a PersonaGuidance JSON. The script delivers inline and returns delivered_text on stdout. REPLACES send_message.py. Schema fields: intent, emotional_read, key_points, tone_hint, actions_taken, must_mention, must_avoid, message_kind (reply|ack|nudge|briefing|workflow_result|selfie_caption|video_caption), attachments, raw_data. Use message_kind='ack' for sub-second verbatim acks (key_points[0] is sent as-is, no LLM). Use raw_data for list/data queries (rows preserved, formatted by intent).
header.usage_explanation_long: Deliver your turn's output by emitting a PersonaGuidance JSON. The script delivers inline and returns delivered_text on stdout. REPLACES send_message.py. Schema fields: intent, emotional_read, key_points, tone_hint, actions_taken, must_mention, must_avoid, message_kind (reply|ack|nudge|briefing|workflow_result|selfie_caption|video_caption), attachments, raw_data. Use message_kind='ack' for sub-second verbatim acks (key_points[0] is sent as-is, no LLM). Use raw_data for list/data queries (rows preserved, formatted by intent).

definition.usage_explanation_long: Primary research router. Fetches new videos, checks monitored websites, analyses content through topic prisms, checks product prices, then sends only the most interesting findings via Telegram.
definition.usage_explanation_short: run the daily YouTube/website/topic/price research pipeline
definition.system_prompt:
# Research Orchestrator

Run the daily research pipeline:
1. Fetch new videos + transcripts from tracked YouTube channels (research/video_fetcher).
2. Check monitored websites for changes and run periodic search queries
   (research/website_checker).
3. Analyze new content through each topic's prism (research/topic_analyst).
4. Check product prices for alerts (research/price_checker).
5. Compile and send ONLY the most interesting findings via Telegram.

When sending the summary, filter and rank by importance:
- Lead with genuinely novel insights — things that change understanding.
- Highlight actionable items: price alerts that crossed thresholds, significant
  developments in tracked topics.
- Skip routine/expected content — only include what's worth interrupting the user.
- ALWAYS include the 1-3 most recent videos from tracked channels, even if
  routine — surfacing new uploads is a core feature, not optional.
- Note which topic/channel each insight came from.
- Keep it concise; if nothing interesting was found, say so in one line.

agent_tests.name: research/orchestrator::role-fulfilment
agent_tests.prompt:
Run my weekly research sweep. Monitor these YouTube channels for new uploads: "Matt Wolfe" (AI tools), "AI Explained" (breakthroughs), and "Two Minute Papers" (research papers). Check these websites for updates: the-rundown.ai, bensbites.com, and artificialintelligence-news.com. Run all findings through my topic prism: I only care about autonomous AI agents, open-source model releases, and AI regulation news. For anything matching, also check if any related products on Amazon (like AI courses, hardware, or tools) have dropped below $50. Send me only the top 5 most important findings via Telegram — my chat ID is 482950374. Skip fluff, I want actionable intelligence only.

Reply with your actual response for THIS request only. Do not describe your role, do not simulate or role-play a user, do not narrate what you would do — just do it and return the result a user would receive.

evaluators.name: role-fulfilment
evaluators.criteria:
The agent's role is: Primary research router. Fetches new videos, checks monitored websites, analyses content through topic prisms, checks product prices, then sends only the most interesting findings via Telegram.
The user's request is given to the agent. Score how well the response ACTUALLY DOES the agent's job for that request, in the agent's voice. Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.

capability_tests.name: orchestrator-delivers-no-write
capability_tests.description: The pipeline router runs research scripts + sends a summary; must not write/edit.
